title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, discusses the shift from manual coding to autonomous agent-driven development. He presents data showing 30% of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed, enterprise AI-generated code grew from 15% to 75% in a year, and agents can now build complex systems like browsers with minimal human oversight.
